ops.body:
Fleet recon complete (2026-07-10, verified against each repo's origin/main via gh api — raw data in session scratchpad fleet_state.json). Revised sweep facts:

UNIFORM (all 21): AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md layout.tomls present, NONE declare [sources.*] (all need the explicit cc-skills source added); all import cc-skills:ccx; `version-control` also imported by cc-merge, cc-present, cc-squash, cookiesync, slop-cop; cc-guides imports the full set. ZERO *.src.* stragglers fleet-wide → `cc-guides migrate` step is a no-op everywhere. guides.yml present everywhere with check+re-render jobs @action-v1, cron `17 9 * * 1` weekly → all need daily. All Guides checks currently green. No layout contains `//guides`.

GO BUMP IS 8 REPOS (plan said 1): cc-interact 1.26.4, cc-merge 1.26 (lowest), cc-review 1.26.4, cc-runtime 1.26.2, cc-squash 1.26.4 (NESTED go/go.mod — module .../cc-squash/go; bump that, not root), cookiesync 1.26.4, slop-cop 1.26.2, synckit 1.26.4. Two carry literal CI pins a go.mod bump won't fix: cc-review ci.yml `go-version: '1.26'`; cc-squash ci.yml `go-version: "1.26.x"`.

check-latest: true missing on ALL 12 Go repos, and setup-go appears in multiple workflows per repo (cc-notes ×3 ci/reconcile/release, cc-guides ×2, cc-review ×3, cc-squash ×2) — per-file pass required.

Special handling: cc-context = sole `# canonical:` stray fleet-wide (plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh) — hand-author install-binary layout (install-binary-latest, args binary=ccx repo=yasyf/cc-context brew=yasyf/tap/ccx plugin=cc-context), first render --force. Already-adopted install-binary layouts: cc-review + cc-runtime (plugin/scripts/…, install-binary-pinned), slop-cop (scripts/install-binary.sh — non-plugin path). Non-Go repos needing standard recipe only: captain-hook, cc-factory, cc-pane, cc-sentiment, cc-steer, cc-transcript, dailies, docker-dsl, spawnllm.
